series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of applications, renewals, notices of termination, correspondence, and other documents relating to the licensure of Ohio State Retirement System Investment Officers and Ohio Bureau of Workers Compensation Chief Investment Officers.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in operating area a period of from date of approval, denial, renewal or scanned and verified ; Electronic: machine readable records on database from date of (Licensee''s, Firm''s) last application, renewal or compliance activity is completed or closed
